records.ety: [OF. ewer, euwier, prop. a water carrier, F. vier a washing place, sink, aiguire ewer, L. aquarius, adj., water carrying, n., a water carrier, fr. aqua water; akin to Goth. ahwa water, river, OHG. aha, G. au, aue, meadow. √219. Cf. Aquarium, Aquatic, Island.]

defs: A kind of wide-mouthed pitcher or jug; esp., one used to hold water for the toilet.
quotes: Basins and ewers to lave her dainty hands.
